title: Pelagic Diving Atoll session-open: hygiene done; architecture-led review pass next
body: Pelagic Diving Atoll opening session on observability-sentry-otel thread, branch feat/eef_exploration HEAD b539c7c5. Thread record refreshed (landing target now points at unified plan observability/current/feat-eef-exploration-completion.plan.md). Identity row added additively per PDR-027. Active claim 1c0622d4 opened on plan body + continuity surfaces (non-overlapping with Moonlit Shimmering Comet 8ed6386d smoke-tests areas; Moonlit's freshness window expected expired). No-speed-pressure rule (just-landed) is the live discipline through every step. Owner direction (auto-mode + this turn): proceed with hygiene-first then narrowed architecture-led review (code-reviewer gateway + barney/betty/fred/wilma + assumptions-reviewer) covering both plan body AND code surface (commits fd4eabaa..b226670d, no-speed-pressure rule, observability/env packages). Specialist reviewers (test/config/security/mcp/sentry/clerk/docs-adr/onboarding/release-readiness) escalated by findings rather than pre-dispatched up front. Plan body intent is preserved; the dispatch shape is what shifts to honour no-speed-pressure (do the work the work needs, not the ceremony the plan named in default form). Dispatching reviewers next.
